mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_item t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_item WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_item t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.category = #{category} ORDER BY t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND category = #{category}

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_item t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (t.name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.model_no LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.supplier LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.item_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR model_no LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR supplier LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR item_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_item t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_item ( item_code, name, category, model_no, kc_cert_no, grade, supplier, unit_price, replace_cycle, cert_expiry, min_stock, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{itemCode}, #{name}, #{category}, #{modelNo}, #{kcCertNo}, #{grade}, #{supplier}, #{unitPrice}, #{replaceCycle}, #{certExpiry}, #{minStock}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_item SET item_code = #{itemCode}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, model_no = #{modelNo}, kc_cert_no = #{kcCertNo}, grade = #{grade}, supplier = #{supplier}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, replace_cycle = #{replaceCycle}, cert_expiry = #{certExpiry}, min_stock = #{minStock}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_item SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) FROM tb_ppe_item WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT supplier) FROM tb_ppe_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND supplier IS NOT NULL
